ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Customer's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Customer's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Customer's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Customer's state */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Customer's zip code */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the customer account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the customer account was last modified */,
  "language_preference" TEXT /* Customer's preferred language */,
  "communication_preference" TEXT /* Customer's preferred communication method (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "marketing_opt_in" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has opted-in to marketing communications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the service plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the service plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service plan */,
  "monthly_cost" REAL /* Monthly cost of the service plan */,
  "annual_cost" REAL /* Annual cost of the service plan */,
  "internet_service" TEXT /* Type of internet service (e.g., DSL, Fiber optic) */,
  "data_limit" TEXT /* Data limit for the service plan */,
  "speed" TEXT /* Speed of the internet service */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in months */,
  "early_termination_fee" REAL /* Fee for early termination of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the subscription */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service plan */,
  "subscription_start_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription started */,
  "subscription_end_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription ends */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, expired, cancelled) */,
  "auto_renew" INTEGER /* Whether the subscription is set to auto-renew */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription is set to renew */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_subscriptions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_subscriptions_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES service_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phone_services" (
  "phone_service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the phone service */,
  "phone_service_name" TEXT /* Name of the phone service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phone service */,
  "monthly_cost" REAL /* Monthly cost of the phone service */,
  "minutes_included" INTEGER /* Number of minutes included in the phone service */,
  "text_messages_included" INTEGER /* Number of text messages included in the phone service */,
  "data_allowance" TEXT /* Data allowance for the phone service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phone_service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_phone_services" (
  "customer_phone_service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer phone service subscription */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer */,
  "phone_service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the phone service */,
  "subscription_start_date" TEXT /* Date the phone service subscription started */,
  "subscription_end_date" TEXT /* Date the phone service subscription ends */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the phone service subscription (e.g., active, expired, cancelled) */,
  "auto_renew" INTEGER /* Whether the phone service subscription is set to auto-renew */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the phone service subscription is set to renew */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_phone_service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_phone_services_phone_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("phone_service_id") REFERENCES phone_services ("phone_service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_phone_services_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "add_ons" (
  "add_on_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the add-on */,
  "add_on_name" TEXT /* Name of the add-on */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the add-on */,
  "monthly_cost" REAL /* Monthly cost of the add-on */,
  "one_time_cost" REAL /* One-time cost of the add-on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("add_on_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_add_ons" (
  "customer_add_on_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer add-on subscription */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer */,
  "add_on_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the add-on */,
  "subscription_start_date" TEXT /* Date the add-on subscription started */,
  "subscription_end_date" TEXT /* Date the add-on subscription ends */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the add-on subscription (e.g., active, expired, cancelled) */,
  "auto_renew" INTEGER /* Whether the add-on subscription is set to auto-renew */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the add-on subscription is set to renew */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_add_on_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_add_ons_add_on_id FOREIGN KEY ("add_on_id") REFERENCES add_ons ("add_on_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_add_ons_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing_invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the invoice */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was issued */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice is due */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., unpaid, paid, overdue) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_invoices_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the invoice item */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the item */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES billing_invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the payment */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice the payment is for */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_payments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES billing_invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_support_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the support log */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer */,
  "support_agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the support agent */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the support interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of support interaction (e.g., phone call, email) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the support interaction */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was resolved */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the issue (e.g., resolved, unresolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_support_logs_support_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("support_agent_id") REFERENCES support_agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_support_logs_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the support agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the support agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the support agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the support agent */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the support agent belongs to */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the support agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, logout, update customer) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device that performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the promotion starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the promotion ends */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of the discount */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of the discount (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the promotion (e.g., new customers, existing customers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_promotions" (
  "customer_promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer promotion */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the promotion */,
  "applied_date" TEXT /* Date the promotion was applied */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the promotion (e.g., applied, expired, redeemed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_promotions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_promotions_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the survey starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the survey ends */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the survey (e.g., active, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_surveys" (
  "customer_survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer survey response */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was responded to */,
  "response_data" TEXT /* JSON data of the survey responses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_surveys_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_surveys_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feedback */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., new, reviewed, addressed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "churn_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the churn prediction */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the churn prediction was made */,
  "churn_probability" REAL /* Probability of the customer churning */,
  "churn_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the churn prediction */,
  "recommended_action" TEXT /* Recommended action to prevent churn */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_churn_predictions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the recommendation */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "recommended_service" TEXT /* Recommended service (e.g., internet, phone, TV) */,
  "recommended_plan" TEXT /* Recommended plan (e.g., basic, premium) */,
  "recommended_add_on" TEXT /* Recommended add-on (e.g., online security, streaming TV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_value" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer */,
  "clv_date" TEXT /* Date the CLV was calculated */,
  "clv_score" REAL /* CLV score (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "clv_segment" TEXT /* CLV segment (e.g., high value, medium value, low value) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "clv_date")
)
